The root cause is that when retrieving the org layout, datasource passwords are masked and never returned, so when I write it back, the username remains but the password is missing—an invalid state the API won't accept. This is a classic read-modify-write problem with sensitive data. I need to check how other PUT operations handle this scenario to find the right approach.
